name: sysbot
description: Discord system bot — multi-guild, text-command based, fully modular and extensible

scripts.start: node scripts/check-database-url.mjs && prisma migrate deploy && node dist/index.js
scripts.start:prod: node scripts/check-database-url.mjs && prisma migrate deploy && node dist/index.js
scripts.dev: prisma migrate deploy && tsx watch src/index.ts
